scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @proactive/backend && npm run build --workspace @proactive/admin-dashboard && npm run typecheck --workspace mobile-app
scripts.test: npm test --workspace @proactive/backend -- --runInBand && npm test --workspace @proactive/admin-dashboard && npm test --workspace mobile-app
scripts.test:coverage: npm test --workspace @proactive/backend -- --runInBand --coverage --coverageReporters=text-summary && npm run test:coverage --workspace @proactive/admin-dashboard && npm run test:coverage --workspace mobile-app
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @proactive/admin-dashboard && npm run typecheck --workspace mobile-app
scripts.verify: npm run prisma:generate && npm run build && npm test
